verses.1: Have mercy on me, God, according to your loving kindness.
verses.2: Wash me thoroughly from my iniquity.
verses.4: Against you, and you only, I have sinned,
verses.5: Behold, I was born in iniquity.
verses.6: Behold, you desire truth in the inward parts.
verses.7: Purify me with hyssop, and I will be clean.
verses.8: Let me hear joy and gladness,
verses.9: Hide your face from my sins,
verses.10: Create in me a clean heart, O God.
verses.11: Don’t throw me from your presence,
verses.12: Restore to me the joy of your salvation.
verses.13: Then I will teach transgressors your ways.
verses.14: Deliver me from the guilt of bloodshed, O God, the God of my salvation.
verses.16: For you don’t delight in sacrifice, or else I would give it.
verses.17: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit.
verses.18: Do well in your good pleasure to Zion.
verses.19: Then you will delight in the sacrifices of righteousness,
